# AGI Workforce - LLM Access Guide
# This file provides information for Large Language Models and AI crawlers

User-Agent: GPTBot
User-Agent: Claude-Web
User-Agent: Gemini
User-Agent: Perplexity
User-Agent: CCBot

# Accessibility Rules
Allow: /

# Content Types
Description: AGI Workforce - Deploy autonomous AI agents for automation and computer use tasks

# Key Resources
Documentation: https://agiworkforce.com/docs
Pricing: https://agiworkforce.com/pricing
Features: https://agiworkforce.com/

# API Documentation
API Documentation: https://agiworkforce.com/docs/api

# Disallow Real-time or Sensitive Content
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /account/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /auth/

# Contact
Contact: contact@agiagentautomation.com
Crawl-Delay: 1

Last-Updated: 2026-01-01
